case_title: PAUL ANTHONY WEBBER VS. RENE BIEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WEBBER, PAUL ANTHONY REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER AS TO DEFENDANT BIEN, RENE REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBBER, PAUL ANTHONY REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIEN, RENE REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,670.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BIEN, RENE REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT RENE BIEN WAS PRESENT IN COURT PRIOR TO CASE BEING CALLED, HOWEVER WHEN CASE WAS CALLED SHE WAS NOT PRESENT, HOWEVER ERIK STENTZ, A MANAGER FROM GEICO INSURANCE, IS PRESENT AND STATED THAT HE DID NOT KNOW RENE BIEN, HAD NEVER MEET HER BEFORE, BUT A LADY WALKED UP TO HIM AND HANDED HIM A PACKET OF INFORMATION AND WALKED AWAY. ERIK STENTZ REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IN THIS MATTER IS DENIED BY THE COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$95.00) SERVED JUL-16-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIEN, RENE REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.
